tracks.rawText: 0:55[Rec] Apr 24 00:22:42UploadMariachi ballad in 3/4 time at 110 BPM in the key of G major, The arrangement features a prominent trumpet section playing melodic fanfares with wide vibrato and staccato articulations, A vihuela and guitarrón provide the rhythmic and harmonic foundation with percussive strumming and deep, plucked bass lines, A baritone male vocalist delivers a passionate performance characterized by dramatic dynamic shifts and sustained notes, Violins provide counter-melodies and lush harmonic pads using legato bowing, The production is clean with natural room reverb on the brass and vocals3PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Apr 24 00:22:42

tracks.rawText: 2:38[Rec] Apr 24 00:21:23UploadLatin Pop ballad, Acoustic guitar plays a rhythmic strumming pattern with occasional percussive slaps on the strings, A male vocalist sings in a melodic, emotive tenor range with moderate vibrato, The arrangement is sparse, focusing on the interplay between the vocal melody and the acoustic guitar, The tempo is 82 BPM in 4/4 time, The recording features natural room reverb on the vocals and guitar1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:22No Viene Chotav5.5Roots reggae at 72 BPM with skanking guitar offbeats, one-drop drums, deep sub bass, and a bright trombone lead carrying the hook, Percussion uses congas, shaker, and rim clicks; tape delay on vocals, spring reverb on the horn, smoky dub echoes, and a chantable chorus built for crowd response1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:10Chota Encendidav5.5Conscious rap with syncopated trumpet stabs, muted jazz trumpet motifs, and off-kilter drum programming that fights the bar line, Dusty boom-bap kick, snappy rimshot, ghost notes, and swinging hi-hats under a laid-back sub bass, Smoky tape saturation, vinyl hiss, sparse ambient crowd textures, and tense minor-key Rhodes accents3PublishRemix
